_comment_NAMING: TC name format: 'Web_Module_Verb object' or 'Mobile_Module_Verb object' for platform-exclusive TCs. Omit prefix ONLY when Platform = 'Web and Mobile'. The prefix in the artifact draft MUST be copied verbatim into the API name field — never strip it.
_comment_POST: POST /v2/testcases — Create. Uses string fields and flat folderId.

POST_create.name: Web_Order_Verify payment term on item details screen when Enable Payment Terms is OFF
POST_create.objective: Platform: Web and Mobile. Market: VN. Verify payment terms display when feature is disabled.
POST_create.precondition:
- User is {APP_NAME} user (Customer, Admin)
- Enable Payment Terms is ON

_comment_PUT: PUT /v2/testcases/{key} — Update. CRITICAL: use nested objects for folder/status/priority/project. Flat folderId is silently ignored and WIPES the folder.

PUT_update.name: Web_Order_Verify payment term on item details screen when Enable Payment Terms is OFF
PUT_update.objective: Platform: Web and Mobile. Market: VN. Verify payment terms display when feature is disabled.
PUT_update.precondition:
- User is {APP_NAME} user (Customer, Admin)
- Enable Payment Terms is ON

_comment_LINK: POST /v2/testcases/{key}/links/issues — Link to Jira. Use numeric issueId. Path is /links/issues NOT /issuelinks.
_comment_PLATFORM: Platform rules: Single AC [WEB+MOBILE] → ONE TC, Platform='Web and Mobile', no prefix. Two separate ACs same behavior different platform → TWO TCs with Web_/Mobile_ prefix.
